channel.title: Posts on Captain Jak.
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Captain Jak.

item.title: Zorro:New-age Pseudonymous social network
item.description: No one knows who you are on Zorro, except everyone in Zorro

item.title: Are we going to see ads in Windows File explorer?
item.description: Recently a leaked picture shows that Microsoft is tested to place ads in windows file explorer.

item.title: Social Engineering attacks in Metaverse
item.description: This article is all about, Advanced Social Engineering attacks on vulnerable people in Metaverse. Unlike traditional Social engineering attacks, hackers using the most advance and effective methods to get personal/sensitive data from people of Metaverse without getting caught.

item.title: Right to be Forgotten vs Know your Customer
item.description: My experiences on Data removal requests from legal/pvt companies, collides with Know Your Customer policy.

item.title: Dating in Metaverse: Future of Online Dating
item.description: Dating in Metaverse: Future of Online Dating

item.title: Privacy in the age of 'Information is Privilege'
item.description: ‘Information is Privilege’ Does users data privacy is being valued?? This article is being drafted now

item.title: 'we are bellingcat' book summary
item.description: A quick summary of " we are bellingcat " book

item.title: How do you run a CyberCrime Gang
item.description: HOW DO YOU RUN A CYBERCRIME GANG

item.title: Why do you need to Pentest your servers.
item.description: Pentest | Everything you need to know.

item.title: CISSP preparation | Everything you need to know.
item.description: CISSP preparation | Everything you need to know. Don’t communicate by sharing memory, share memory by communicating.
